book.title: Alla festa della natura. Il viaggio di Musasabi
book.author: Yasuko Katahira

system_principle: The system operates as a progressive harmony accumulation field. Each stop on the journey adds a companion and a perceptual field to the group. The festival is never shown — it exists as an open field beyond the last page. The reader builds the harmony through the journey, not through its description.

primary_loops.label: viaggio_accumulativo
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Each journey stop adds a companion and a perceptual field. The group grows with each recognition. The harmony is built cumulatively.
primary_loops.description: The journey is the structure — each stop has its animal, its place, its field.

primary_loops.label: armonia_notturna
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Species sleep together without declaration. The harmony is lived physically, not described.
primary_loops.description: The warmth of Kitsune's fur is the most concrete form of harmony in the book.

primary_loops.label: tanuki_ritmo_comico
primary_loops.propagation_logic: The Tanuki's hunger cycles through the entire book — eat, sleep, wake hungry. The comic rhythm structures the journey's time.
primary_loops.description: The Tanuki is the biological clock of the journey.

primary_loops.label: shimaenaga_preparatore
primary_loops.propagation_logic: ShimaEnaga has already prepared everything. The smallest of the group is the most organized. The Blue Pond changes color as if the world is preparing.
primary_loops.description: Tenderness as a form of efficiency.

primary_loops.label: festa_campo_aperto
primary_loops.propagation_logic: The festival is never shown. The book closes at the threshold — the morning before the celebration. The reader builds the festival with everything the journey has given them.
primary_loops.description: The open field is the most powerful element of the system.

global_state.system_behavior: The system accumulates harmony through the journey. Each stop adds a companion, each night adds warmth, each dawn opens the field further. The festival is the reader's to build.
global_state.reader_effect: Il lettore bambino costruisce l'armonia con la natura attraverso il viaggio — non viene spiegata ma vissuta tappa dopo tappa.

catalog_connection.ratata_lascia_cadere_la_pioggia: stesso sistema bilingue IT+JA — albo illustrato per bambini con protagonisti animali giapponesi
catalog_connection.everyday_matcha: stesso campo culturale giapponese contemporaneo — rituali quotidiani come forma di armonia
catalog_connection.tante_storie_per_pensare: stesso destinatario bambino — illustrazioni come campo percettivo primario
